title: Pushing My AI Dark Factory to Its Limits with Opus + Kimi Combined
summary: Cole Medin's AI Dark Factory is a self-building codebase system that uses Archon workflows to orchestrate code generation. To scale beyond a single model's reasoning capacity, he rebuilds the factory to combine Claude Opus for deep reasoning tasks with Kimi K2.6 for faster implementation and validation work, optimizing token efficiency across different task complexities.
